member.name: T:BreezeSdk.Runtime.Breeze
member.summary: Main entry point for the Breeze Payment SDK. Use to create the singleton instance before calling any other methods.

member.name: P:BreezeSdk.Runtime.Breeze.Instance
member.summary: Gets the initialized singleton instance of . Returns null if has not been called yet.

member.name: M:BreezeSdk.Runtime.Breeze.Initialize(BreezeSdk.Runtime.BreezeConfiguration)
member.summary: Initializes the Breeze SDK singleton with the provided configuration. Must be called once before accessing or invoking any payment methods. Call first if you need to re-initialize with a different configuration.
member.param: The SDK configuration. is required.
member.exception: Thrown when is null or is empty.

member.name: M:BreezeSdk.Runtime.Breeze.Uninitialize
member.summary: Tears down the Breeze SDK singleton, releasing all associated resources. After calling this method, returns null until is called again.

member.name: E:BreezeSdk.Runtime.Breeze.OnPaymentOptionsDialogDismissed
E:BreezeSdk.Runtime.Breeze.OnPaymentWebviewDismissed
M:BreezeSdk.Runtime.Breeze.GetDeviceUniqueId
member.summary: Returns a stable, device-unique identifier suitable for correlating sessions. On iOS this is the vendor identifier (IDFV); on Android it is the Android ID.
member.returns: A non-empty string containing the device unique identifier.

member.name: M:BreezeSdk.Runtime.Breeze.ShowPaymentOptionsDialog(BreezeSdk.Runtime.BrzShowPaymentOptionsDialogRequest)
member.summary: Presents the Breeze payment options dialog over the current Unity view. When the user dismisses the dialog, is raised on the main thread.
member.param: The request describing the product and payment options to display.

member.name: M:BreezeSdk.Runtime.Breeze.DismissPaymentPageView
member.summary: Programmatically dismisses any currently-visible payment page web view. Has no effect if the web view is not currently shown.

member.name: M:BreezeSdk.Runtime.Breeze.ShowPaymentWebview(BreezeSdk.Runtime.BrzShowPaymentWebviewRequest)
member.summary: Presents the Breeze payment web view over the current Unity view, loading the given payment URL. When the user dismisses the web view, is raised on the main thread.
member.param: The request containing the direct payment URL and optional data payload.

member.name: M:BreezeSdk.Runtime.Breeze.NotifyOnPaymentOptionsDialogDismissed(BreezeSdk.Runtime.BrzPaymentDialogDismissReason,System.String)
member.summary: Native-to-managed callback invoked by the platform layer when the payment options dialog is dismissed. Forwards the event to on the active instance.
member.param: The reason the dialog was dismissed.
Optional JSON payload passed from the native dialog.

member.name: M:BreezeSdk.Runtime.Breeze.NotifyOnPaymentWebviewDismissed(BreezeSdk.Runtime.BrzPaymentWebviewDismissReason,System.String)
member.summary: Native-to-managed callback invoked by the platform layer when the payment web view is dismissed. Forwards the event to on the active instance.
member.param: The reason the web view was dismissed.
Optional JSON payload passed from the native web view.

member.name: T:BreezeSdk.Runtime.BreezeConfiguration
member.summary: Configuration object required to initialize the Breeze SDK via .

member.name: P:BreezeSdk.Runtime.BreezeConfiguration.AppScheme
member.summary: The custom URL scheme registered for your application (without the colon or slashes). Used by the Breeze payment page to redirect back into your game after a payment flow. Must match the scheme declared in your iOS Info.plist and Android AndroidManifest.xml. Example: "yourgame" (results in the redirect URL yourgame://...).

member.name: P:BreezeSdk.Runtime.BreezeConfiguration.Environment
member.summary: Specifies which Breeze backend environment the SDK communicates with. Defaults to . Use during development and QA.

member.name: T:BreezeSdk.Runtime.BreezeEnvironment
member.summary: Selects the Breeze backend environment used by the SDK.

member.name: F:BreezeSdk.Runtime.BreezeEnvironment.Production
member.summary: The live production environment. Use for released builds.

member.name: F:BreezeSdk.Runtime.BreezeEnvironment.Development
member.summary: The development/sandbox environment. Use during testing and QA.

member.name: T:BreezeSdk.Runtime.BreezeConstants
member.summary: Constants used across the Breeze SDK.

member.name: F:BreezeSdk.Runtime.BreezeConstants.SDK_VERSION
member.summary: The current version of the Breeze SDK.

member.name: T:BreezeSdk.Runtime.BreezeHelper
member.summary: General-purpose URL and locale utilities used internally by the Breeze SDK.

member.name: M:BreezeSdk.Runtime.BreezeHelper.BuildRequestUrl(System.String,System.String,System.Collections.Specialized.NameValueCollection)
member.summary: Constructs an absolute URL from a base URL, a path, and an optional set of query parameters.
member.param: The scheme and host portion of the URL (e.g., "https://pay.breeze.cash").
The URL path (e.g., "/checkout").
Query parameters to append. Pass null or an empty collection for no query string.

member.name: M:BreezeSdk.Runtime.BreezeHelper.UpdateUrlQueryParams(System.String,System.Collections.Specialized.NameValueCollection,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Merges or appends query parameters into an existing URL.
member.param: The base URL whose query string will be modified.
The parameters to merge in.
When true, parameters are added without removing existing keys (multi-value allowed). When false (default), existing keys are replaced by the values in .
member.returns: The URL with the updated query string.

member.name: M:BreezeSdk.Runtime.BreezeHelper.BuildQueryString(System.Collections.Specialized.NameValueCollection)
member.summary: Encodes a into a URL query string using Unity's URL escaping. Keys or values that are null are treated as empty strings.
member.param: The parameters to encode. Returns an empty string when null or empty.
member.returns: A percent-encoded query string without a leading ?, e.g. "key1=val1&key2=val2".

member.name: M:BreezeSdk.Runtime.BreezeHelper.GetCurrentTwoLetterIsoRegionName(System.Globalization.CultureInfo)
member.summary: Returns the two-letter ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 country code for the given . Falls back to "US" if the culture cannot be mapped to a region (e.g., invariant or neutral cultures).
member.param: The culture to resolve to a region.
member.returns: A two-letter uppercase country code such as "US", "GB", or "JP".

member.name: T:BreezeSdk.Runtime.BreezeBase64Helper
member.summary: Utilities for converting between standard Base64 and URL-safe Base64url encoding (RFC 4648 §5).

member.name: M:BreezeSdk.Runtime.BreezeBase64Helper.ConvertBase64UrlToBase64(System.String)
member.summary: Converts a Base64url-encoded string to a standard Base64 string by replacing URL-safe characters and re-adding padding.
member.param: The Base64url input string.
member.returns: A standard Base64 string with +, /, and = padding characters.

member.name: M:BreezeSdk.Runtime.BreezeBase64Helper.ConvertBase64ToBase64Url(System.String)
member.summary: Converts a standard Base64 string to a Base64url string by replacing non-URL-safe characters and stripping padding.
member.param: The standard Base64 input string.
member.returns: A Base64url string safe for use in URLs and filenames.

member.name: M:BreezeSdk.Runtime.BreezeBase64Helper.DecodeBase64UrlToString(System.String)
member.summary: Decodes a Base64url-encoded string to a UTF-8 string.
member.param: The Base64url-encoded input.

member.name: M:BreezeSdk.Runtime.BreezeBase64Helper.DecodeBase64ToBytes(System.String)
member.summary: Decodes a standard Base64 string to a byte array.
member.param: The Base64-encoded input.

member.name: M:BreezeSdk.Runtime.BreezeBase64Helper.DecodeBase64UrlToBytes(System.String)
member.summary: Decodes a Base64url-encoded string to a byte array.
member.param: The Base64url-encoded input.

member.name: M:BreezeSdk.Runtime.BreezeBase64Helper.DecodeBase64ToString(System.String)
member.summary: Decodes a standard Base64 string to a UTF-8 string.
member.param: The Base64-encoded input.

member.name: T:BreezeSdk.Runtime.BreezeDateTimeExtensions
member.summary: Extension methods for converting between and Unix timestamps.

member.name: M:BreezeSdk.Runtime.BreezeDateTimeExtensions.ToUnixTimeMilliseconds(System.DateTime)
member.summary: Converts a to a Unix timestamp in milliseconds (UTC).
member.param: The date/time value to convert.

member.name: M:BreezeSdk.Runtime.BreezeDateTimeExtensions.ToUnixTimeSeconds(System.DateTime)
member.summary: Converts a to a Unix timestamp in seconds (UTC).
member.param: The date/time value to convert.

member.name: M:BreezeSdk.Runtime.BreezeDateTimeExtensions.ToDateTimeFromUnixTimeMilliseconds(System.Int64)
member.summary: Converts a Unix timestamp in milliseconds to a (UTC).
member.param: Milliseconds since the Unix epoch.

member.name: M:BreezeSdk.Runtime.BreezeDateTimeExtensions.ToDateTimeFromUnixTimeSeconds(System.Int64)
member.summary: Converts a Unix timestamp in seconds to a (UTC).
member.param: Seconds since the Unix epoch.

member.name: T:BreezeSdk.Runtime.IBreezeNative
member.summary: Interface for platform-specific native Breeze SDK implementations.

member.name: M:BreezeSdk.Runtime.IBreezeNative.GetDeviceUniqueId
member.summary: Gets the unique device identifier.
member.returns: A string representing the unique device ID.

member.name: M:BreezeSdk.Runtime.IBreezeNative.ShowPaymentOptionsDialog(BreezeSdk.Runtime.BrzShowPaymentOptionsDialogRequest,BreezeSdk.Runtime.BrzPaymentDialogDismissCallback)
member.summary: Shows the payment options dialog.
member.param: The request configuration for the payment options dialog.
Callback invoked when the dialog is dismissed.
member.returns: A result code indicating whether the dialog was shown successfully.

member.name: M:BreezeSdk.Runtime.IBreezeNative.DismissPaymentPageView
member.summary: Dismisses the currently displayed payment page view.

member.name: M:BreezeSdk.Runtime.IBreezeNative.ShowPaymentWebview(BreezeSdk.Runtime.BrzShowPaymentWebviewRequest,BreezeSdk.Runtime.BrzPaymentWebviewDismissCallback)
member.summary: Shows the payment web view.
member.param: The request configuration for the payment web view.
Callback invoked when the web view is dismissed.
member.returns: A result code indicating whether the web view was shown successfully.

member.name: T:BreezeSdk.Runtime.BreezeNativeIos
member.summary: iOS native implementation of .

member.name: T:BreezeSdk.Runtime.BrzShowPaymentOptionsDialogRequest
member.summary: Request object passed to to configure the payment options dialog.

member.name: P:BreezeSdk.Runtime.BrzShowPaymentOptionsDialogRequest.Title
member.summary: Optional title displayed at the top of the payment options dialog.

member.name: P:BreezeSdk.Runtime.BrzShowPaymentOptionsDialogRequest.ProductDisplayInfo
member.summary: Display information for the product being purchased (name, price, icon, etc.).

member.name: P:BreezeSdk.Runtime.BrzShowPaymentOptionsDialogRequest.DirectPaymentUrl
member.summary: The deep-link URL that opens the Breeze payment web view directly. Used when the user selects the "Pay with Breeze" option.

member.name: P:BreezeSdk.Runtime.BrzShowPaymentOptionsDialogRequest.Data
member.summary: An optional opaque string payload forwarded to the event. Use this to carry through any context your game needs when handling the dismissal.

member.name: P:BreezeSdk.Runtime.BrzShowPaymentOptionsDialogRequest.Theme
member.summary: Controls the color theme of the payment options dialog. When null, the dialog follows the system appearance. Defaults to null.

member.name: T:BreezeSdk.Runtime.BrzPaymentOptionsTheme
member.summary: Color theme applied to the payment options dialog UI.

member.name: F:BreezeSdk.Runtime.BrzPaymentOptionsTheme.Auto
member.summary: Follows the current system-level light/dark appearance setting.

member.name: F:BreezeSdk.Runtime.BrzPaymentOptionsTheme.Light
member.summary: Forces the dialog to use a light color scheme.

member.name: F:BreezeSdk.Runtime.BrzPaymentOptionsTheme.Dark
member.summary: Forces the dialog to use a dark color scheme.

member.name: T:BreezeSdk.Runtime.BrzProductDisplayInfo
member.summary: Display metadata for the product shown inside the payment options dialog.

member.name: P:BreezeSdk.Runtime.BrzProductDisplayInfo.DisplayName
member.summary: Human-readable name of the product shown to the user (e.g., "1000 Gold Coins").

member.name: P:BreezeSdk.Runtime.BrzProductDisplayInfo.OriginalPrice
member.summary: The regular (non-Breeze) price string shown as the original price (e.g., "$9.99").

member.name: P:BreezeSdk.Runtime.BrzProductDisplayInfo.BreezePrice
member.summary: The discounted Breeze price string (e.g., "$8.99").

member.name: P:BreezeSdk.Runtime.BrzProductDisplayInfo.Decoration
member.summary: Short promotional label shown on the product tile, e.g. "10% off".

member.name: P:BreezeSdk.Runtime.BrzProductDisplayInfo.ProductIconUrl
member.summary: Product icon image URL. Loaded and displayed inside the dialog at runtime.

member.name: T:BreezeSdk.Runtime.BrzPaymentDialogDismissCallback
member.summary: Callback invoked by the native layer when the payment options dialog is dismissed.
member.param: The reason the dialog was dismissed.
The data passed from the dialog.

member.name: T:BreezeSdk.Runtime.BrzPaymentDialogDismissReason
member.summary: Describes why the payment options dialog was dismissed. Received via .

member.name: F:BreezeSdk.Runtime.BrzPaymentDialogDismissReason.CloseTapped
member.summary: The user tapped the close/cancel button without selecting a payment option.

member.name: F:BreezeSdk.Runtime.BrzPaymentDialogDismissReason.DirectPaymentTapped
member.summary: The user selected the direct Breeze payment option.

member.name: F:BreezeSdk.Runtime.BrzPaymentDialogDismissReason.AppStoreTapped
member.summary: The user tapped the Apple App Store in-app purchase option.

member.name: F:BreezeSdk.Runtime.BrzPaymentDialogDismissReason.GoogleStoreTapped
member.summary: The user tapped the Google Play Store in-app purchase option.

member.name: T:BreezeSdk.Runtime.BrzShowPaymentOptionsResultCode
member.summary: Result code returned by the native layer after calling ShowPaymentOptionsDialog. Used internally; games should rely on for flow control.

member.name: F:BreezeSdk.Runtime.BrzShowPaymentOptionsResultCode.Success
member.summary: The dialog was shown successfully.

member.name: F:BreezeSdk.Runtime.BrzShowPaymentOptionsResultCode.NullInput
member.summary: A null input parameter was provided.

member.name: F:BreezeSdk.Runtime.BrzShowPaymentOptionsResultCode.InvalidUtf8
member.summary: The request JSON contained invalid UTF-8 characters.

member.name: F:BreezeSdk.Runtime.BrzShowPaymentOptionsResultCode.JsonDecodingFailed
member.summary: The request JSON could not be decoded.

member.name: T:BreezeSdk.Runtime.BrzShowPaymentWebviewRequest
member.summary: Request object passed to to open the Breeze payment web view.

member.name: P:BreezeSdk.Runtime.BrzShowPaymentWebviewRequest.DirectPaymentUrl
member.summary: The deep-link URL that the payment web view will load. Typically provided by the Breeze backend or constructed via your game server.

member.name: P:BreezeSdk.Runtime.BrzShowPaymentWebviewRequest.Data
member.summary: An optional opaque string payload forwarded to the event. Use this to carry through any context your game needs when handling the dismissal.

member.name: T:BreezeSdk.Runtime.BrzPaymentWebviewDismissCallback
member.summary: Callback invoked by the native layer when the payment web view is dismissed.
member.param: The reason the web view was dismissed.
Optional JSON payload passed from the native web view.

member.name: T:BreezeSdk.Runtime.BrzPaymentWebviewDismissReason
member.summary: Describes why the payment web view was dismissed. Received via .

member.name: F:BreezeSdk.Runtime.BrzPaymentWebviewDismissReason.Dismissed
member.summary: The user dismissed the web view manually without completing a payment.

member.name: F:BreezeSdk.Runtime.BrzPaymentWebviewDismissReason.PaymentSuccess
member.summary: The payment was completed successfully.

member.name: F:BreezeSdk.Runtime.BrzPaymentWebviewDismissReason.PaymentFailure
member.summary: The payment failed or was declined.

member.name: F:BreezeSdk.Runtime.BrzPaymentWebviewDismissReason.LoadError
member.summary: The web view failed to load the payment page (e.g., no network).

member.name: T:BreezeSdk.Runtime.BrzShowPaymentWebviewResultCode
member.summary: Result code returned by the native layer after calling ShowPaymentWebview. Used internally; games should rely on for flow control.

member.name: F:BreezeSdk.Runtime.BrzShowPaymentWebviewResultCode.Success
member.summary: The web view was shown successfully.

member.name: F:BreezeSdk.Runtime.BrzShowPaymentWebviewResultCode.NullInput
member.summary: A null input parameter was provided.

member.name: F:BreezeSdk.Runtime.BrzShowPaymentWebviewResultCode.InvalidUtf8
member.summary: The request JSON contained invalid UTF-8 characters.

member.name: F:BreezeSdk.Runtime.BrzShowPaymentWebviewResultCode.JsonDecodingFailed
member.summary: The request JSON could not be decoded.

member.name: F:BreezeSdk.Runtime.BrzShowPaymentWebviewResultCode.InvalidUrl
member.summary: The provided payment URL was malformed or invalid.

member.name: T:BreezeSdk.Runtime.DialogDismissedPayload
member.summary: JSON payload received from the native layer when the payment options dialog is dismissed.

member.name: F:BreezeSdk.Runtime.DialogDismissedPayload.Reason
member.summary: The reason the payment options dialog was dismissed.

member.name: F:BreezeSdk.Runtime.DialogDismissedPayload.Data
member.summary: Optional data passed back from the dialog.

member.name: T:BreezeSdk.Runtime.WebViewDismissedPayload
member.summary: JSON payload received from the native layer when the payment web view is dismissed.

member.name: F:BreezeSdk.Runtime.WebViewDismissedPayload.Reason
member.summary: The reason the payment web view was dismissed.

member.name: F:BreezeSdk.Runtime.WebViewDismissedPayload.Data
member.summary: Optional data passed back from the web view.

member.name: T:BreezeSdk.Runtime.BreezeNativeNoop
member.summary: No-op implementation of used in the Unity Editor and unsupported platforms.

member.name: T:UnitySourceGeneratedAssemblyMonoScriptTypes_v1.MonoScriptData
member.summary: Data is UTF-8 encoded strings
